name_cn:
Top-tier replica, changed code chip
M13617 authentic development, matching steel lock hardware
This Sunset handbag features Monogram canvas. Lustrous metal hardware and Monogram details capture a classic style, instantly elevating the look. Generous structure accommodates daily essentials, while the brand buckle adds a striking touch.
Dimensions: 27 x 18 x 3 cm (Length x Height x Width)
